final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow, announcing the launch of "GPT-5.5", with speaker Sam Altman, styled to match Chinese GP/VC roadshow conventions.

Style/medium: corporate PPT cover slide illustration, Chinese domestic VC/GP roadshow aesthetic — authoritative, aspirational, tech-forward
Composition: full-bleed slide layout (16:9), large headline centered or upper-center, speaker name and title bottom-left or bottom-right, logo/brand mark top-left, subtle geometric or circuit-pattern background layer
Subject: GPT-5.5 launch announcement cover slide; speaker listed as 奥特曼 (Sam Altman)
Scene/backdrop: deep navy or dark tech-blue gradient background with subtle glowing grid or neural-network line pattern, conveying cutting-edge AI innovation
Lighting/mood: polished, confident, institutional — warm accent glow on headline to signal milestone announcement
Color palette: deep navy blue base, gold or electric-blue accent for headline, white body text — consistent with Chinese GP roadshow deck conventions
Materials/textures: smooth gradient, fine circuit/neural-network line texture overlay, no photographic elements
Text (verbatim): "GPT-5.5 发布" as main headline; "演讲人：奥特曼" as speaker credit line; optional sub-line "融资路演" or "战略融资说明会"
Constraints: slide must read as a legitimate Chinese domestic GP/VC fundraising deck cover; all Chinese text legible at presentation scale; layout must follow standard 16:9 PPT proportions
Avoid: Western startup pitch aesthetic, casual or playful fonts, cluttered layout, stock-photo backgrounds, red/green color schemes associated with retail finance
